Items.Title: C-sharp 中的 Mini-profiler 简介 - iFour Technolab | Introduction to Mini-profiler in C-sharp - iFour Technolab
Items.Description:
对于开发人员来说，主要挑战是调试和优化为向服务器发出的请求编写的查询。 不可能获得每个页面的查询请求的确切时间。 通常，开发人员会考虑一、二、三等计数并计算平均值，但这不是解决方案，作为开发人员，这不是我们想要的。 在开发人员的工具网络选项卡中，提供有关每次请求页面加载所用时间的信息，但这不足以让开发人员了解哪个查询需要更多时间以及哪个查询需要优化。 这可以通过 Mini-profiler 完成。

由于性能，它被用于生产。 要使用分析器开发人员，需要做两处更改。

  • 首选用于调用所需 CSS 和 JavaScript 文件的母版页。
  • 在 application_Begin 请求和 Application_End 请求中，需要调用来启动和停止使用 JQuery 1.6.1 的分析器。 开发人员可以在给定的视图或控制器中调用 Mini-profiler。 由于 .NET 的本机 Db 连接类，对 Entity Framework 和 LINQ to SQL 的微型分析器支持。 查询的数量和它们花费的时间包含在当时执行的步骤中。 为了检测像 N+1 反模式分析器这样的常见错误，它将检测多个仅在参数值上有所不同的查询。

迷你分析器配置文件是什么？

它用于生产和堆栈 Exchange 系列站点使用 Mini-profiler。

让我们从一个例子开始：

阅读更多： MVC 中的测试驱动开发

第 1 步：创建一个 asp.net 应用程序
启动视觉工作室 2019

打开开始窗口并选择创建一个新项目。

在创建新项目页面中，在搜索框中搜索 Asp.Net Web 应用程序模板，然后选择下一步。

在配置新项目页面的项目名称框中输入 DemoLibrary。 然后按创建按钮。

第 2 步：安装 Min-profiler .mvc5 NuGet 包
安装迷你分析器。 来自 NuGet 数据包管理器的 mvc5 NuGet 包，用于提供与 ASP.NET MVC 的正确集成。

右键单击项目并选择管理 NuGet 包。

在搜索框中的 NuGet 页面中搜索 miniprofiler.mvc5。 从列表中选择MiniProfiler.Mvc5，然后单击安装按钮。

第 3 步：为 Mini-profiler 添加配置
在 application_start 方法中的 Global.asax 文件中添加配置。

在 Global.asax 文件的 application_start 方法中添加以下代码块。

要使用 MiniProfiler.Configure() 方法，您必须使用 StackExchange.Profiling 添加； 在 Global.asax 文件中添加 Application_beginrequest() 和 Application_endrequest() 方法

protected void Application_beginrequest() { MiniProfiler profiler = null; if (Request.IsLocal) { profiler = MiniProfiler.StartNew(); } } protected void Application_endrequest() { MiniProfiler.Current?.Stop(); }

第四步：在视图页面中添加脚本

添加脚本最简单的方法是在 shared/_Layout.cshtml 主视图中添加脚本。使用 StackExchange.Profiling 添加； 在视图页面中使用 @MiniProfiler.Current.RenderIncludes() 方法的命名空间。

在 _Layout.cs 页面中添加以下一行代码：

 <system.webserver> <handlers> <add name="MiniProfiler" path="mini-profiler-resources/*" precondition="integratedMode" resourcetype="Unspecified" type="System.Web.Routing.UrlRoutingModule" verb="*"> </add></handlers> </system.webserver>

第 5 步：为路由请求添加配置
让我们运行项目，没有任何反应，因为 Miniprofiler 依赖于 JavaScript 和 .js 请求，因此 .net 请求没有被执行。

在配置文件中添加以下代码块

现在运行您的项目，您将在应用程序的左上角获得 MiniProfiler UI，通过单击，您将获得执行时间信息。

第 6 步：跟踪 MVC 控制器

当前视图显示整体执行，这不是很有用。 在 MVC 应用程序中通过将新过滤器添加到管道中可以位更多关于每个操作的执行时间的信息。

计划聘请C# Web 开发公司？ 您的搜索到此结束。

将以下行添加到 FilterConfig 文件中

filters.Add(new ProfilingActionFilter());

并使用 StackExchange.Profiling.Mvc 添加； 命名空间

现在，运行您的应用程序，您将找到控制器的执行时间。

第 7 步：开始使用它。
这是一些尝试的示例代码。

在 Home 控制器的 Index 方法中添加以下代码块

public ActionResult Index() { var profiler = MiniProfiler.Current; using (profiler.Step("set page title")) { ViewBag.title = "home page"; } using (profiler.Step("doing complex stuff")) { using (profiler.Step("step a")) { // simulate fetching a url using (profiler.CustomTiming("http", "get http://google.com")) { Thread.Sleep(10); } } using (profiler.Step("step b")) { // simulate fetching a url using (profiler.CustomTiming("http", "get http://stackoverflow.com")) { Thread.Sleep(20); } using (profiler.CustomTiming("redis", "set \"mykey\" 10")) { Thread.Sleep(5); } } } // now something that loops for (int i = 0; i < 15; i++) { using (profiler.CustomTiming("redis", "set \"mykey\" 10")) { Thread.Sleep(i); } } return View(); }

运行您的应用程序

使用 MiniProfiler，您可以注意到有趣的信息，即代码调用相同的 15 次以及在不同的操作（如（HTTP、Redis）上花费了多少时间。

结论

在这篇博客中，我们讨论了如何在 ASP.NET MVC 中使用 Mini-Profiler 来监控应用程序的性能，我们还讨论了显示应用程序执行时间的示例。



原文:

For a developer a main challenge is to debug and optimize queries that are written for the request made to the server. It is impossible to get the exact time of the queries request for each page. Usually, developer considers count such as one, two, three and calculate the average but this is not a solution and as a developer, this is not we want. In developer's tool network tab provide information about the time per the request made for a page load but that is not enough for a developer to understand which query takes more time and which query requires optimization. This can be done by Mini-profiler.

Introduction to Mini-profiler

Mini-profiler is a profiling library that is used to monitor the performance of your ASP.NET application. It is used in production because of performance. Mini-profiler is developed by the team of stack exchange and it is available as a NuGet package and easy to use.

Mini-profiler can be used with high-performance micro ORM supporting SQL server, MySQL, SQLite etc. MVC Mini-profiler is an internal profiler that requires some modification to the pages being examined. To use the profiler developer, need to do two changes.

  • Prefer the master page which is used to call needed CSS and JavaScript file.
  • In application_Begin request and Application_End request, calls are required to start and stop profiler for that JQuery 1.6.1 is used. The developer can call Mini-profiler within a given view or controller. The most useful feature of the Mini-profiler is its integration with the DB framework. Mini-profiler support for Entity Framework and LINQ to SQL because of .NET’s native Db-connection class. The number of queries and the amount of time they take is included in the step executed at that time. To detect common mistakes like N+1 anti-pattern profiler will detect multiple queries that differ only by argument value.

What does a mini-profiler profile?

Mini-profiler does not attach to every call, this could be invasive and could not focus on performance.

Mini-profiler provides the following feature:

  • An ADO.Net profiler is used to profiling calls on raw ADO.Net, SQL Server, Oracle, Linq to SQL, Entity framework which includes code first and EF core and a range of other data access scenarios.
  • Mini-profiler provides pragmatic step instrumentation that can be added to code to profile explicitly.

Where is Mini-profiler used?

Stack Overflow develops Mini-profiler. It is used in production and stack Exchange family sites use Mini-profiler.

Let's start with an example:

Read More: Test Driven Development In MVC

Step 1: Create an asp.net application
Start visual studio 2019

Open the start window and select to create a new project.

In Create new project page, search Asp.Net Web application template in the search box and then choose Next.

Enter DemoLibrary in the Project name box in configure your new project page. Then press Createbutton.

Step 2: Install the Min-profiler .mvc5 NuGet package
Install the mini-profiler. mvc5 NuGet package from NuGet packet manager which is used to provide correct integration with ASP.NET MVC.

Right-click on the project and select the Manage NuGet package.

Search miniprofiler.mvc5 in NuGet page in the search box. SelectMiniProfiler.Mvc5 from the list, and then click on the Install button.

Step 3: Add configuration for Mini-profiler
Add Configuration in Global.asax file in application_start method.

Add following block of code inside application_start method on Global.asax file.

To use MiniProfiler.Configure() method you have to add using StackExchange.Profiling; library in Global.asax file.


MiniProfiler.Configure(new MiniProfilerOptions());

Add Application_beginrequest() and Application_endrequest() method in Global.asax file


protected void Application_beginrequest()
{
MiniProfiler profiler = null;
if (Request.IsLocal)
{
profiler = MiniProfiler.StartNew();
}
}
protected void Application_endrequest()
{
MiniProfiler.Current?.Stop();
}

Step 4: Add Script in the view page

The easiest way of adding script is to add a script in shared/_Layout.cshtml master view.Add using StackExchange.Profiling; namespace to use @MiniProfiler.Current.RenderIncludes() method in view page.

Add following one-line code into _Layout.cs page:


<system.webserver>
<handlers>
<add name="MiniProfiler" path="mini-profiler-resources/*" precondition="integratedMode" resourcetype="Unspecified" type="System.Web.Routing.UrlRoutingModule" verb="*">
</add></handlers>
</system.webserver>

Step 5: Add Configuration for route request
Let's run the project and nothing happens because Miniprofiler dependent on JavaScript and .js request therefore .net request is not executed.

Add following block of code in configuration file

Now run your project and you will get MiniProfiler UI on the left corner of the application and by click, you will get execution time information.

Step 6: To track MVC controller

Current view display overall execution which is not very useful. In the MVC application by adding a new filter into the pipeline can bit more information on the execution time of each action.

Planning to Hire C# Web Development Company? Your Search ends here.

Add the following Line into the FilterConfig file


filters.Add(new ProfilingActionFilter());

And add using StackExchange.Profiling.Mvc; namespace

Now, run your application and you will find the execution time of the controller.

Step 7: Start using it.
Here is some sample code for the try.

Add the following block of code in the Index method of the Home controller


public ActionResult Index()
{
var profiler = MiniProfiler.Current;
using (profiler.Step("set page title"))
{
ViewBag.title = "home page";
}
using (profiler.Step("doing complex stuff"))
{
using (profiler.Step("step a"))
{
// simulate fetching a url
using (profiler.CustomTiming("http", "get http://google.com"))
{
Thread.Sleep(10);
}
}
using (profiler.Step("step b"))
{
// simulate fetching a url
using (profiler.CustomTiming("http", "get http://stackoverflow.com"))
{
Thread.Sleep(20);
}
using (profiler.CustomTiming("redis", "set \"mykey\" 10"))
{
Thread.Sleep(5);
}
}
}
// now something that loops
for (int i = 0; i < 15; i++)
{
using (profiler.CustomTiming("redis", "set \"mykey\" 10"))
{
Thread.Sleep(i);
}
}
return View();
}

Run your application

Using MiniProfiler you can notice interesting information that the code is calling the same 15 times and how much time is spent in a different operation like (HTTP, Redis).

Conclusion

In this blog, we have discussed how to use the Mini-Profiler in ASP.NET MVC which is used to monitor the performance of your application and we have also discussed examples that display the execution time of the application.
Items.Author: harshalsuthar

Items.Title: Golang 中的并发简介 | Intro to Concurrency in Golang
Items.Description:
在处理并发问题时，很难推断何时向下移动抽象堆栈（机器、进程、线程、硬件组件等）。 大多数编程语言都使用线程作为其最高抽象级别。 幸运的是，Go 建立在此之上并引入了Goroutine 。

虽然 Golang 在sync包中提供了传统的锁定机制，但它的理念更倾向于“通过通信共享内存”。 因此，Golang 引入了通道作为Goroutines相互通信的媒介。

 //goroutine go func() { // do some work }() //channel dataStream := make(chan interface{})

分叉连接模型

随时； 一个子 Goroutine 可以被fork与它的父级做并发工作，然后会在某个时候加入。

每个 Go 程序都有一个主 Goroutine 。 主要的可以比它的孩子更早退出； 因此，需要一个连接点来确保子 Goroutine 有机会完成。

渠道

通道总是返回 2 个值：1 是返回的对象，1 是状态（ true表示有效对象， false表示不会在此通道中发送更多值）

 intStream := make(chan int) close(intStream) integer, ok := <- intStream fmt.Printf("(%v): %v", ok, integer) // (false): 0

渠道方向

var dataStream <-chan interface{} //read from only channel var dataStream chan<- interface{} // write to only channel var dataStream chan interface{} // 2 ways

通道容量

通道的默认容量为 0（无缓冲通道）。 从空通道读取或写入全通道是阻塞的。

 c := make(chan int,10) //buffered size of 10 c := make(chan int) //unbuffered channel

如果缓冲通道为空并且有接收器，则缓冲区将被绕过，值将直接从发送器传递给接收器。

针对 Goroutine 的通道行为

当 Goroutine 从通道读取或写入通道时，可能会根据通道状态发生各种行为。

 intStream := make(chan int) // 0 capacity channel go func() { defer close(intStream) for i:=1; i<=5; i++{ intStream <- i } }() //range from a channel for integer := range intStream { // always blocked until the channel is closed fmt.Printf("%v ", integer) }

下表总结了所有行为：

运营通道状态结果
读零堵塞
打开且不为​​空价值
打开并清空堵塞
关闭只写编译错误
写零堵塞
开满堵塞
开放且未满写入值
关闭panic
只接收编译错误
关闭零panic
打开且不为​​空关闭频道。 后续读取成功值，直到通道为空，然后读取默认值。
打开和清空关闭频道。 读取产生默认值。
关闭panic
只接收编译错误

由于行为是复杂的，我们应该有办法制作一个健壮且可扩展的程序。

使用渠道时的强大且可扩展的方式

这是1个建议方式：

  • 最多 1 个 Goroutine 拥有一个通道的所有权。 频道所有权应该很小以便于管理。
  • 频道所有者具有写访问权限（ chan← ）；
  • 而消费者只有只读视图（ ←chan ）。

  1. 频道所有者

  2. 渠道消费者

 chanOwner := func() <-chan int { resultStream := make(chan int, 5) //init go func() { defer close(resultStream) // close for i:=0;i<=5;i++{ resultStream <- i // write } }() return resultStream // read channel returned } resultStream := chanOwner() for result := range resultStream { fmt.Printf("Received: %d\n", result) } fmt.Println("Done receiving!")

参考文献：

Concurrency in Go: Tools and Techniques for Developers - Book by Katherine Cox-Buday Go 中的并发：开发人员的工具和技术 - Katherine Cox-Buday 所著



原文:

When dealing with conccurency problem, it is harder to reason about when moving down the stack of abstraction (machine, process, thread, hardware components, etc). Most programming languages use thread as its highest level of abstraction. Fortunately, Go build on top of that & introduce Goroutine.

“Share memory by communicating, don’t communicate by sharing memory.” - One of Go’s mottos

Although Golang provides traditional locking mechanism in sync package, its philosophy prefers “share memory by communicating”. Therefore, Golang introduces channel as the medium for Goroutines to communicate with each other.

//goroutine
go func() { 
    // do some work
}()

//channel
dataStream := make(chan interface{})

Fork-join model

Fork-join concurrency model that Go follows

This concurrency model is used in Golang. At anytime; a child Goroutine can be fork to do concurrent work with its parent & then will join back **at some point.

Every Go program has a main Goroutine. The main one can be exit earlier than its children; as a result, a join point is needed to make sure children Goroutine has chance to finish.

Channel

Channel holds the following properties:

  • Goroutine-safe (Multiple Goroutines can access to shared channel without race condition)
  • FIFO queue semantics

Channel always return 2 value: 1 is object returned, 1 is status (true means valid object, false means no more values will be sent in this channel)

intStream := make(chan int)
close(intStream)
integer, ok := <- intStream 
fmt.Printf("(%v): %v", ok, integer) // (false): 0

Channel direction 

var dataStream <-chan interface{} //read from only channel
var dataStream chan<- interface{} // write to only channel
var dataStream chan interface{} // 2 ways

Channel capacity

Default capacity of a channel is 0 (unbuffered channel). Reading from empty or writing to full channel is blocking.

c := make(chan int,10) //buffered size of 10
c := make(chan int) //unbuffered channel

if a buffered channel is empty and has a receiver, the buffer will be bypassed and the value will be passed directly from the sender to the receiver.

Channel behavior against Goroutine

When a Goroutine read from or write to a channel, various of behaviours might happen depending on channel state.

intStream := make(chan int) // 0 capacity channel

go func() {
    defer close(intStream) 
    for i:=1; i<=5; i++{
      intStream <- i
  }
}()

//range from a channel
for integer := range intStream { // always blocked until the channel is closed
    fmt.Printf("%v ", integer)
}

Below table summarizes all the behaviour:

Operations Channel state Result
Read nil Block
Open & not empty Value
Open & empyt Block
Closed [default value], false
Write only Compile error
Write nil Block
Open & full Block
Open & not full Write value
Closed panic
Receive only Compile error
close nil panic
Open & not empty Closes channel. Subsequent reads succeed value until channel is empty, then it reads deafult value.
Open & empty Closes channel. Reads produces default value.
Closed panic
Receive only Compile Error

As the behaviour is clomplex, we should have a way to make a robust and scalable program.

Robust & scalable way when working with channel

Here is 1 suggestion way:

  • At most 1 Goroutine have the ownership of a channel. The channel ownership should be small to be managable.
  • Channel owner have a write-access (chan←);
  • While consumer only have read-only view (←chan).

  1. Channel owners

  2. Channel consumer

chanOwner := func() <-chan int { 
    resultStream := make(chan int, 5) //init
    go func() {
        defer close(resultStream) // close
        for i:=0;i<=5;i++{ 
            resultStream <- i // write
    } }()
    return resultStream // read channel returned
}

resultStream := chanOwner()
for result := range resultStream {
  fmt.Printf("Received: %d\n", result)
}
fmt.Println("Done receiving!")

Refereneces:

Concurrency in Go: Tools and Techniques for Developers - Book by Katherine Cox-Buday

Items.Title: Python 初始化列表 - 怎么做？ | Python Initialize List - How to do it?
Items.Description:
它是一个容器，我们可以在其中插入、删除或修改现有值，因为列表在 Python 中是可变的。 与集合不同，列表可以多次保存相同的值，并将每个值视为单独的项目。 在本教程中，我们将阅读如何在 Python 中初始化列表。

目录

在 Python 中，用户可以使用不同的方式执行单个任务。 同样，为了在 Python 中初始化一个列表，有不止一种方法可以做到这一点，我们将在本教程中讨论一些。

在 Python 中使用方括号初始化列表

如果你想在 Python 中创建一个没有值的空列表，方括号是用空值初始化列表的方法。 您只需通过指定一组没有项目值的方括号来声明一个非值列表。

输入：

 list = [] print (list) list = [1,2,3,4] print (list)

输出：

在 Python 中使用 list() 函数初始化列表

这是在 Python 中创建没有值的空列表的另一种方法，因为 list() 函数从可迭代对象创建列表。

可迭代对象可以是容器、支持迭代的序列或迭代器对象。 如果未指定参数，则创建一个新的空列表。

输入：

 list_1 = list() print (list_1) res = [] print (data == res)

输出：

由于方括号方法更具指导性和简洁性，因此它优于 list() 函数方法。

使用推导式在 Python 中初始化列表

为了用默认值初始化列表，我们可以使用理解方法。 它由方括号组成，其中包含一个表达式，后跟一个 for 子句，再后跟一个可选的 if 子句。 表达式可以是您想要放在列表中的任何类型的对象。 由于用户正在用零初始化列表，因此表达式将只是 0。

列表推导式是一种基于迭代器定义列表的简单方法，因为它优雅、简单且被广泛认可。

输入：

 list = [i for i in range(5)] print (list)

输出：

这种方法比使用 for 和 while 循环在 Python 中初始化列表要快得多。

在 Python 中使用 * 运算符初始化列表

使用多个值初始化列表的另一种方法是 * 运算符。 语法是 [object]*n，其中 n 是数组中元素的数量。

此方法允许我们创建具有特定数量的预定义值的列表。

输入：

 list = [5]*10 print (list)

输出：

这是所有讨论过的在 Python 中初始化列表的方法中最快的方法。

使用 * 运算符在 Python 中初始化列表的唯一缺点是在声明 2d 数组时，因为它会创建浅列表，即只会创建一个列表对象，并且所有索引都将引用该对象，这可能很不方便。 这就是为什么在二维数组的情况下，推导是初始化列表的更好方法。

结束的想法

初始化列表是使用列表时要了解的基本事项之一。 我们已经讨论了方括号和 list() 函数来创建空列表和推导式，以及 * 运算符来创建具有多个值的列表。 可以在这里了解其他 Python 概念。



原文:

Python List is a collection of ordered values and can hold any type of value. It is a container where we can insert, delete or modify the existing values as the list is mutable in Python. Unlike sets, the list can hold the same value multiple times and considers each as a separate item. In this tutorial, we will read how to initialize a list in Python.

Table of contents

Introduction to Python Initialize List

In Python, a user can perform a single task using different ways. Similarly, in order to initialize a list in Python, there is more than one way to do that and we will discuss a few in this tutorial.

Initialize lists using the square brackets in Python

If you want to create an empty list with no values in Python, the square bracket is the way to initialize the list with empty values. You just have to declare a non-value list by specifying a set of square brackets without item values.

Input: 

list = []
print (list)

list = [1,2,3,4]
print (list)

Output:

Using the list() function to initialize the list in Python

It is another way to create an empty list without values in Python as the list() function creates the list from the iterable object.

An iterable may be a container, a sequence that supports iteration, or an iterator object. If no parameter is specified, then a new empty list is created.

Input: 

list_1 = list()
print (list_1)

res = []
print (data == res)

Output:

Since the square bracket approach is more instructive and concise, it is preferred over the list() function approach.

Using comprehensions to initialize the list in Python

In order to initialize the list with default values, we can use the comprehension method. It consists of square brackets containing an expression followed by a for clause and further followed by an optional if clause. The expression can be any type of object that you want to put on the list. Since the user is initializing the list with zeros, the expression will just be 0.

List comprehension is an easy way to define a list based on an iterator because it is elegant, simple, and widely recognized.

Input: 

list = [i for i in range(5)]
print (list)

Output:

This method is way faster than using for and while loops to initialize lists in Python.

Initialize lists using the * operator in Python

Another approach to initialize the list with multiple values is the * operator. The syntax is [object]*n where n is the no of elements in the array.

This method allows us to create a list with a specific number of predefined values.

Input: 

list = [5]*10
print (list)

Output:

This is the fastest method among all the methods discussed to initialize the list in Python.

The only drawback of using the * operator to initialize a list in Python is while declaring 2d arrays as it creates shallow lists i.e only one list object would be created and all the indices would refer to this object which can be inconvenient. That is why in the case of 2d arrays, comprehensions are the better way to initialize a list.

Closing thoughts

Initializing the list is one of the basic things to know while working with lists. We have discussed square brackets and the list() function to create empty lists and comprehensions and the * operator to create a list with multiple values. One can learn about other Python concepts here.
Items.Author: hrishikesh1990

Items.Title: 我在 AWS 上的#CloudResumeChallenge | My #CloudResumeChallenge on AWS
Items.Description:
在获得我的AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner和AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate证书后，是时候运用我所获得的知识和技能以及建立个人项目组合了。

我在研究中遇到了云简历挑战，并立即决定承担这个项目。 我加入了 Discord 服务器社区并研究了完成挑战所需要做的事情。

该项目有几个阶段，我只用了一周多的时间就完成了它。

这就是架构。

网站前端

不久前，我为自己注册了一个自定义域名，并将其移至 Route 53 上的托管区域，准备将其用于此项目。

我下载了一个免费的 HTML5 网站主题并对其进行了定制以反映我的技能和经验。 准备就绪后，我在 AWS 上创建了一个 S3 存储桶来托管一个静态网站并上传文件。 在我验证网站使用 S3 存储桶网站端点地址工作后，我创建了一个 CloudFront 分配并使用通过 AWS Certificate Manager 颁发的证书启用 HTTPS。

部署 CloudFront 分配后，我更新了托管区域中的 DNS 记录，以便使用我的自定义域名解析 CloudFront 分配。 我还更新了 S3 存储桶策略以允许 CloudFront 分配访问存储桶。

下一步是通过集成 JavaScript 代码以通过下一节中创建的公共 API 网关调用 Lambda 函数来确保满足动态访客计数器的要求。

网站后台

对于后端基础设施，我利用 AWS 无服务器应用程序模型 (SAM) 生成了一个框架，该框架创建了 REST API 网关、Lambda 函数以及 DynamoDB 表。 我确实考虑将 Lambda 函数一分为二，一个用于更新访客计数器，另一个用于获取访客计数器，但从效率的角度来看，我保留了一个函数。 将来我可能会根据微服务意识形态重新审视这一点。

这些资源是使用 IaC 和 CloudFormation 创建的，以协助自动部署。 我想在不久的将来更改它以使用 Terraform。

熟悉 Git 后，我​​将其用于源代码控制，这很有意义，因为我将使用 GitHub Actions 创建一个工作流，该工作流将构建、测试并将后端部署到 AWS。

在将代码推送到 Git 之前，我使用 SAM 在 Docker 容器中本地构建和测试。

这可能是项目中最令人满意的部分，但也是最令人沮丧的部分。 它需要大量的反复试验和研究才能使其正常工作。 但其中最好和最令人满意的部分是在您的 PC 上进行更新，将更改推送到 Git 并自动更新网站应用程序。

该网站可以在这里找到

接下来是 AWS Certified SysOps Administrator - Associate 和 AWS Certified Developer - Associate 认证，以进一步提高我的技能和知识。

谢谢

感谢 Forrest Brazeal 创建#CloudResumeChallenge 以及对 Discord 服务器的所有支持。 Lou Bichard on YouTube also has a great channel for learning - Open Up The Cloud YouTube 上的 Lou Bichard 也有一个很棒的学习频道 - Open Up The Cloud



原文:

Having obtained my AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate certificates, it was time to put the knowledge and skills that I had acquired to use as well as building up a personal project portfolio.

I came across the Cloud Resume Challenge in my research and straight away decided to undertake this project. I joined the Discord server community and researched what needed to be done to complete the challenge.

There are a several stages to the project and it took me just over a week to complete it.

This the architecture.

The Website Frontend

I had registered a custom domain name for myself a while back and moved it into a hosted zone on Route 53, ready to use it for this project.

I downloaded a free HTML5 website theme and customized it to reflect my skills and experience. Once ready, I created a S3 bucket on AWS to host a static website and uploaded the files. Once I had verified that the website worked using the S3 bucket website endpoint address, I created a CloudFront distribution and enabled HTTPS using a certificate issued via the AWS Certificate Manager.

Once the CloudFront distribution had been deployed, I updated the DNS records in my hosted zone so that the CloudFront distribution resolved with my custom domain name. I also updated the S3 bucket policy to allow the CloudFront distribution to have access to the bucket.

The next step was to make sure that the requirement for a dynamic visitor counter was met by integrating JavaScript code to call the Lambda function via the public API Gateway created in the next section.

The Website Backend

For the backend infrastructure, I made use of the AWS Serverless Application Model (SAM) to generate a framework that created the REST API Gateway, the Lambda function as well as the DynamoDB table. I did contemplate splitting the Lambda function into two, one to update the visitor counter and the other to get the visitor counter but from an efficiencies perspective I kept a single function. I may revisit this in future in keeping with the Microservice ideology.

The Lambda function code was written in Python as well as the test modules.

The resources are created using IaC with CloudFormation to assist with automated deployment. I would like to change this to make use of Terraform in the near future.

Github for source control

Being familiar with Git, I used this for source code control and it made sense as I would be using GitHub Actions to create a workflow that would build, test and deploy the backend to AWS.

Before pushing the code to Git, I made use of SAM to build and test locally in Docker containers.

CI/CD and GitHub Actions

This was probably the most satisfying part of the project but also the most frustrating. It took a lot of trial and error and research to get it working as should. But the best and most satisfying part of it all is making an update on your PC, pushing the changes to Git and having the website application update automatically.

The website can be found here

Next up for me is the AWS Certified SysOps Administrator - Associate and the AWS Certified Developer - Associate Certifications to further improve my skills and knowledge.

Thanks

Thanks go to Forrest Brazeal for creating the #CloudResumeChallenge as well as all the support on the Discord server. Lou Bichard on YouTube also has a great channel for learning - Open Up The Cloud

Items.Title: 我过去两个月的旅程 | My journey over the last two months
Items.Description:
阿瓦尔侯赛因

发表于我们的游戏结束之旅您好！ 在过去的两个月里，我一直在与 Progamming Hero 工作安置团队合作。 实际上，我们获得了影子实习机会。 这大约相当于实际实习的 70%。 本次实习共有11个团队，每个团队有6名队员。 除了周六和周日，我们每天都安排参加两次 Scrum 会议。 很少有学生变得烦躁。 仅仅是因为他们必须每天参加两次 Scrum 会议。 好吧，我也对这种 scrum 感到厌烦，但我最终习惯了。

游戏结束项目

每个团队都被赋予了一个独特的项目，例如电子商务、医疗、旅馆查找器、汽车共享和问题跟踪器。 问题跟踪器项目已交给我们小组。 我们的项目与众不同，我们使用的技术是我们以前从未接触过的技术。 以下是我们用于构建此应用程序的技术列表。 我对这些技术完全不熟悉。 结果，我不得不从头开始学习所有这些技术，然后将它们集成到我们的程序中。 我在使用 socket.io 和 WebRTC 时遇到了很多错误，我不知道如何修复它们。 特别是，当我使用 socket.io 时，它同时给了我大量的连接。 但是，经过整整两周的尝试，我已经能够实现实时聊天、音视频通话、推送通知和屏幕共享。

问题跟踪器如何工作？
请允许我给你讲一个故事。 它目前正在遇到应用程序的性能、用户体验和错误问题。 结果，我们走到了这一步。 使用我们的程序，他们可以快速解决问题。

现在，我将向您展示我们的应用程序如何帮助他们解决问题并为他们的客户提供出色的用户体验。

部分：我的项目当您登录时，您将进入此页面，该页面将显示所有项目。 您可以创建自己的项目或受邀参加项目。 您可以单击一个，它将带您到问题板。

部分 - 发行板

问题板是项目下的子菜单。 您可以更改问题的状态、查看报告者的姓名、查看截止日期、倒计时以及下载已上传到特定问题的文件。 您也可以使用电子邮件邀请个人加入此问题板。

部分 - 用户分配

您可以在此处为不同的用户分配不同的角色。 如果您是管理员，您可以使用倒数计时器将不同的开发人员分配给不同的问题，以便他们可以在限定时间内完成错误或问题。

部分 - 项目详情

在这里，您可以查看针对项目报告的所有用户和问题，以及所有问题的详细信息及其详细信息

现在，我将向您展示我们为使 XYZ 启动问题更容易而添加的所有功能。

结论
我知道我们的应用程序有很多错误。 但是，我们正在不停地工作以使该程序更加用户友好，以便即使是非技术人员也可以毫无顾虑地使用它。 哦，顺便说一句，在看到我们的应用程序如何处理 XYZ 初创公司的问题后，他们决定与我们合作。



原文:

Awal Hossain

Posted on May 26

Our End-Game Journey Hi there! For the past two months, I've been working with the Progamming Hero Job Placement Team. We were actually offered a shadow internship. It's approximately equivalent to 70% of an actual internship. There were 11 teams in this internship, each with six team members. Except on Saturday and Sunday, we were scheduled to join two scrum meetings each day. Few of the students were becoming irritated. Simply because they had to attend scrum meetings twice a day. Well, I became bored with this scrum as well, but I eventually got used to it.

End-Game Project

Each team was given an unique project, such as e-commerce, medical, hostel finder, car share, and issue tracker. The Issue Tracker Project was given to our group. Our project was unlike any other, and we were using technology that we had never touched before in our lives. The following is a list of the technologies we used to construct this app. • NextJs • TypeScript • Socket.io • WebRtc

I was completely unfamiliar with these technologies. As a result, I had to learn all of these technologies from scratch and then integrate them into our program. I was getting a lot of errors while working with socket.io and WebRTC, and I had no idea how to fix them. In particular, while I was working with socket.io, it was giving me a large number of connections at once. However, after trying for two whole weeks, I was able to implement real-time chatting, audio and video calling, push notifications, and screen sharing.

How does Issue Tracker work??
Allow me to tell you a story. XYZ is a new start-up that has just released its application. It is currently experiencing performance, user experience, and bug issues with the application. As a result, we've arrived to this point. Using our program, they can quickly fix their problem.

Now I'll show you how our app can help them solve their problem and provide a great user experience for their customers.

Section: My projects When you log in, you land on this page which will show all the projects. You can create your own project or be invited to a project. You can click on one and it will take you to the issue board.

Section - Issue board

Issue board is a submenu under the project. You can change the status of an issue, check the names of the reporters, see the deadlines, countdown timers, and download files that have been uploaded to a certain issue. You may also use email to invite individuals to this issue board.

Section - User assignment

You can assign different roles to different users here. If you are an admin, you can assign different developers to different issues with countdown timers, so that they can finish the bug or issue within the bounded time.

Section - Project details

Here, you can see all the users and the issues reported against a project and also the details of all the issues and their details

Now, I am going to show you all the feature that we have added to make XYZ start-up problem more easy.

** Feature** • User role management • Graphs and Charts • Real-time chatting • Audio and video calling, live screenshare in video call • File upload and download • Dynamic data update with drag and drop • Email invitation • OTP validation • Push notification • SMS to mobile when a critical issue arises

• Responsive

Conclusion
I'm aware that our application has many faults. However, we are working nonstop to make this program more user-friendly so that even a non-technical person may use it without concern. Ohh, By the way, after seeing how our application can handle the problem of XYZ start - up company, they decided to collaborate with us.

Items.Title: A11Y 101：确保地标是独一无二的 | A11Y 101: Ensure landmarks are unique
Items.Description:
在分析我的网站时，我们发现了以下错误：“确保地标是唯一的”。

此特定错误发生在具有两个<nav>元素的帖子详细信息页面上。

一个用于标签，一个用于页脚。

为什么这有关系？

您可能想知道为什么这些地标应该是独一无二的？
这是一个非常有效的问题。

让我们从屏幕阅读器的角度来看这个场景。

屏幕阅读器使用地标来识别页面上的结构。 如果存在两个或多个相同的地标，我们需要使用标签使它们独一无二。

屏幕阅读器可以识别每个地标的用途。 这对于导航元素尤其重要。

解决问题

让我们以我的网站为例来解决这个问题。 有两个导航元素，我们需要识别它们。

我将 aria-label 添加为标签元素的“标签”。

 <nav aria-label= "Tag" > <ul> <li> #remix </li> </ul> </nav>

请注意，您不必明确声明navigation 。 因为屏幕阅读器已经将其读作“标签导航”。

对于页脚，我们应用相同的概念：

 <nav aria-label= "Footer" > <ul> <li> about </li> </ul> </nav>

就是这样。 通过定义 aria 标签，我们确保每个地标都是唯一的。

这个概念也应该应用于重复的页眉、页脚和表单，因为它们都是地标。

重复的地标

我听到你想知道，但是重复的地标呢？
那么，例如，您在页眉和页脚中的导航是否完全相同？

好吧，在这种情况下，您可以使用相同的标签。

 <header> <nav aria-label= "Main" > <ul> <li> home </li> </ul> </nav> </header> <footer> <nav aria-label= "Main" > <ul> <li> about </li> </ul> </nav> </footer>

感谢您的阅读，让我们联系吧！

感谢您阅读我的博客。 随时订阅我的电子邮件通讯并在Facebook或Twitter 上联系



原文:

While analyzing my website, we found the following error: "Ensure landmarks are unique".

This specific error occurred on a post detail page with two <nav> elements.

One is used for the tags, and one is in the footer.

Why does it matter?

You might be wondering why these landmarks should be unique?
And that's a very valid question.

Let's view this scenario from a screen reader perspective.

Screen readers use landmarks to identify the structure on a page. If two or more of the same landmark are present, we need to make them unique with labels.

The screen reader can identify what each landmark is used for. This is especially important for navigation elements.

Fixing the issue

Let's take my website as an example and fix the issue. There are two nav elements, and we need to identify them.

I added the aria-label as "Tag" for the tag element.

<nav aria-label="Tag"> <ul> <li>#remix</li> </ul>
</nav>

Do note that you don't have to explicitly state navigation. As the screen readers will already read this as "tag navigation".

And for the footer we apply the same concept:

<nav aria-label="Footer"> <ul> <li>about</li> </ul>
</nav>

And that's it. By defining the aria label, we ensure each landmark is unique.

This concept should also be applied to duplicate headers, footers, and forms as they are all landmarks.

Repeated landmarks

I hear you wonder, but what about repeated landmarks?
So, for instance, are your navigation in the header and footer precisely the same?

Well, you can use the same label in that case.

<header> <nav aria-label="Main"> <ul> <li>home</li> </ul> </nav>
</header> <footer> <nav aria-label="Main"> <ul> <li>about</li> </ul> </nav>
</footer>

Thank you for reading, and let's connect!

Thank you for reading my blog. Feel free to subscribe to my email newsletter and connect on Facebook or Twitter

无论环境温度如何，这款便携式空气冷却器是否真正工作？ 本次调查将涵盖与 Blast Portable AC 相关的所有内容。

什么是 Blast 辅助便携式交流电？

随着夏天的临近，COVID 仍然是一个问题，人们可能不得不寻找更好的方法来保持室内凉爽。 在这种情况下，理想的选择是 Blast Auxiliary Portable AC，因为它可以在任何地方冷却，同时又是一个小巧轻便的小工具。 它是一个三合一的独立空气冷却器，可用作空气冷却器、标准风扇和加湿器。

使用富有想象力的蒸发冷却创新，这款空气冷却器非常有效。 正如创新的名字所暗示的那样，消失预计会降低气温。 在这种情况下，温暖的空气通过吸水的阴影进入并转移。 当空气中的强度粒子与水原子相互作用时，结果是更冷的空气。 然后，这个装置中的内置风扇会耗尽寒冷、潮湿的空气。

由于Blast Auxiliary Classic AC也可以用作加湿器，因此它可以帮助干燥的热空气输送干燥的眼睛、皮肤和鼻子。 它附带一个耐用的电池，可以使用一整天。 由于该小工具包括 USB Type C 充电连接器，因此 USB Type C 链接有望为电池重新供电。 充电系统速度很快，您可以在很长一段时间内再次使用它而无需加油。 该装置同样以一种外在无休止的引人入胜的方式进行设计。 凭借其白色和小计划，它有效地融入您的环境元素。

爆炸辅助便携式交流电功能

除了让人们在年中唱歌时保持凉爽外，Blast Auxiliary Portable AC 还能将颗粒捕获在水帘中并避免形状发育。 因为它让他们冷静下来。 空气中的颗粒会被水帘捕获，由于使用了许可的水套，因此空气中的空气变得新鲜。

快速冷却：

各种基于网络的客户端验证了空气冷却器快速和真正产生冷空气的能力。 根据制造商的说法，空气冷却器可以在 30 秒内输送高达 2.7 m/s 的冷空气，使空气恢复活力。 这为您提供了额外的优势，可以立即让您的整个身体和环境元素降温。

从低到高，您可以根据您持续的冷却需求单独选择。 您可以在 Blast Auxiliary 的空气冷却器的计划中看到这些新颖的变化。

水箱：

尽管体积很小，但这款便携式空调有一个可以容纳一吨水的水箱。 在一个可以有效进入的区域，可以轻松地将水箱加满。 当水没了时，您可以打开顶盖并给水箱加满水，这样您就可以在家中保持适宜的温度。 由于该装置依赖于水箱的冷却组件，因此向水箱中注满冷水始终非常明智。

可更换水帘：

不一致、节能的水帘是空气冷却器用来为您提供冷空气的另一项冷却创新。 基本上，将这种水帘泼在水中，它会消耗水分，消除热量并产生凉爽，平静的微风。

这种水帘非常引人注目，可以在等待更换之前持续长达 6-8 个月。 它可以在瞬间有效地更换，并且可以在权威的 Blast Auxiliary 网站上及时更换新的水帘。

活动百叶：

来自空气冷却器的冷空气通过这些称为百叶窗的小开口进入您的空间。 百叶窗可有效定制，因此您可以根据自己的喜好调节寒冷、恢复活力的空气。

携带方便

在它空置的时候，它比 2 磅轻得多。 在填充之后，重量超过 2 磅。 无论如何，当它装满时，这款便携式空气冷却器并不难移动。 此外，它有自己的传送手柄。 这表明该小工具的便携性得到了提升。 只要您有一个水平的表面区域可以放置和设置它，无论白天还是晚上，都可以享受凉爽的空气。

气质灯饰：

这样可以改善您的降温体验，因为它可以营造凉爽的气候，您可能会在病毒空气中放松。 灯光同样营造出迷人的环境，非常适合舒适的讨论和放松的时间。

要为 Blast Auxiliary Portable AC 充电，基本上将其插入 PC 上的 USB 端口或另一个适当的端口。 然后，您可以将其水箱加满。 泼水包裹，然后从那里吹冷空气。 同样，它比传统的空气冷却框架更容易跟上和清洁，这需要主题专家的贡献，以防万一出现问题。

哪里可以买到 Blast 辅助便携式交流电

原文:

Items.Title: 如何在 React 中构建 DateCountdown？ | How to build a DateCountdown in React?
Items.Description:
最近我申请了一个前端开发人员的职位，他们要求我解决一个 React 挑战。 除此之外，他们还要求构建一个可重用的 DateCountdown 组件。 如果您有兴趣查看挑战，请查看此 Reddit 帖子。

看看最后的Takeaways 部分，了解我在这里使用的一些有用的模式，这些模式对你的项目很有用。

这就是组件最终的样子。 检查沙箱以获取完整代码。

 const DateCountdown = ({ endDate }: DateCountdownProps ) => { const { rDays , rHours , rMinutes , rSeconds } = useDateCountdown ( endDate ); return ( < div className = { styles . countdown } > < div className = { styles . clock } > < div className = { styles . ticker } > { rDays } </ div > < div className = { styles . label } > Days </ div > </ div > < Separator /> < div className = { styles . clock } > < div className = { styles . ticker } > { rHours } </ div > < div className = { styles . label } > Hours </ div > </ div > < Separator /> < div className = { styles . clock } > < div className = { styles . ticker } > { rMinutes } </ div > < div className = { styles . label } > Minutes </ div > </ div > < Separator /> < div className = { styles . clock } > < div className = { styles . ticker } > { rSeconds } </ div > < div className = { styles . label } > Seconds </ div > </ div > </ div > ); };
 const endDate = new Date ( " 2022-12-27T16:25:00 " ); () => < DateCountdown endDate = { endDate } />

实施细节💻

上面的代码几乎是不言自明的，所以让我们专注于自定义钩子，这是一个小技巧。

 import { useEffect , useState } from " react " ; import { getRemainingTime } from " ./DateCountdown.helpers " ; type State = { rDays : number ; rHours : number ; rMinutes : number ; rSeconds : number ; }; const initialState : State = { rDays : 0 , rHours : 0 , rMinutes : 0 , rSeconds : 0 }; const useDateCountdown = ( endDate : Date ) => { const [ state , setState ] = useState < State > ( initialState ); useEffect (() => { const remainingTime = getRemainingTime ( endDate ); setState ( remainingTime ); const intervalId = setInterval (() => { const remainingTime = getRemainingTime ( endDate ); setState ( remainingTime ); }, 1000 ); return () => clearInterval ( intervalId ); }, [ endDate ]); return state ; }; export { useDateCountdown };

请注意，我在setInterval之外调用getRemainingTime函数，因为间隔将在 1 秒后调用getRemainingTime ，我希望它尽快启动。

为了实现getRemainingTime ，我添加了date-fns作为依赖项来帮助进行日期计算。

 import { getDaysInMonth , getMonth , getYear , intervalToDuration } from " date-fns " ; export const getRemainingTime = ( endDate : Date ) => { const now = new Date (); const difference = intervalToDuration ({ start : now , end : endDate }); /** * As the hook is not returning the number of months and years, * it needs to aggreagate those values into the days counter */ let auxD = difference . days || 0 ; let auxY = difference . years || 0 ; let auxM = ( difference . months || 0 ) + auxY * 12 ; for ( let i = 0 ; i < auxM ; i ++ ) { auxD += getDaysInMonth ( new Date ( getYear ( endDate ), getMonth ( endDate ) + i )); } return { rDays : auxD , rHours : difference . hours || 0 , rMinutes : difference . minutes || 0 , rSeconds : difference . seconds || 0 }; };

请注意，来自date-fns的intervalToDuration返回秒到年之间的范围，但是我的自定义钩子只返回秒到天之间的范围，因此我必须实现将剩余月份和年份转换为天的逻辑。

逻辑差不多。 我使用 CSS 模块来设置样式。

 .countdown { display : flex ; align-items : center ; } .dots { margin : 0 0.5rem ; } .dot { width : 3px ; height : 3px ; border-radius : 100% ; background-color : #fff ; } .dot + .dot { margin-top : 3px ; } .clock { display : flex ; flex-direction : column ; align-items : center ; justify-content : center ; position : relative ; background-color : rgba ( 119 , 126 , 144 , 0.2 ); border-radius : 8px ; width : 70px ; height : 60px ; } .ticker { font-size : 1rem ; font-weight : 600 ; } .label { font-size : 0.75rem ; } @media only screen and ( min-width : 640px ) { .dots { margin : 0 1rem ; } .dot { width : 6px ; height : 6px ; } .dot + .dot { margin-top : 6px ; } .clock { width : 100px ; height : 90px ; } .ticker { font-size : 1.5rem ; font-weight : 600 ; } .label { font-size : 1rem ; margin-top : 0.25rem ; } }

备注📖

  • 在我最初的实现中，我没有添加将月和年转换为天的逻辑。 我才意识到，一旦我写了这篇文章🙈

外卖🎯

除了这段代码，我想提请您注意我在这里组装的一些好的 React 模式，这些模式可以用于其他项目。

  • 使用自定义挂钩。 它们可以帮助您编写干净的代码，因为它将视图与逻辑分开。
  • 将关闭的相关文件保存在同一文件夹中。 请注意，我在 DateCountdown 文件夹中嵌套了一些文件，因为这些文件仅由该组件使用。

沙盒



原文:

Recently I applied to a position as a Frontend developer and they asked me to solve a React challenge. Among other things, they asked to build a reusable DateCountdown component. If you're interested to see the challenge, check this Reddit post.

Take a look at the Takeaways section at the end to learn some useful patterns I used here which can be useful in your projects.

TL;DR

This is how the component will look at the end. Check the sandbox for the full code.

const DateCountdown = ({ endDate }: DateCountdownProps) => { const { rDays, rHours, rMinutes, rSeconds } = useDateCountdown(endDate); return ( <div className={styles.countdown}> <div className={styles.clock}> <div className={styles.ticker}>{rDays}</div> <div className={styles.label}>Days</div> </div> <Separator /> <div className={styles.clock}> <div className={styles.ticker}>{rHours}</div> <div className={styles.label}>Hours</div> </div> <Separator /> <div className={styles.clock}> <div className={styles.ticker}>{rMinutes}</div> <div className={styles.label}>Minutes</div> </div> <Separator /> <div className={styles.clock}> <div className={styles.ticker}>{rSeconds}</div> <div className={styles.label}>Seconds</div> </div> </div> );
}; 

const endDate = new Date("2022-12-27T16:25:00");
() => <DateCountdown endDate={endDate} />

Implementation details 💻

The code above is pretty much self explanatory so let's focus on the custom hook which is a little tricker.

import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { getRemainingTime } from "./DateCountdown.helpers"; type State = { rDays: number; rHours: number; rMinutes: number; rSeconds: number;
}; const initialState: State = { rDays: 0, rHours: 0, rMinutes: 0, rSeconds: 0 }; const useDateCountdown = (endDate: Date) => { const [state, setState] = useState<State>(initialState); useEffect(() => { const remainingTime = getRemainingTime(endDate); setState(remainingTime); const intervalId = setInterval(() => { const remainingTime = getRemainingTime(endDate); setState(remainingTime); }, 1000); return () => clearInterval(intervalId); }, [endDate]); return state;
}; export { useDateCountdown };

Notice that I call the getRemainingTime function outside of the setInterval because the interval will call getRemainingTime just after 1sec and I want it to start asap.

To implement the getRemainingTime I added date-fns as a dependency to help with the date calculations.

import { getDaysInMonth, getMonth, getYear, intervalToDuration
} from "date-fns"; export const getRemainingTime = (endDate: Date) => { const now = new Date(); const difference = intervalToDuration({ start: now, end: endDate }); /** * As the hook is not returning the number of months and years, * it needs to aggreagate those values into the days counter */ let auxD = difference.days || 0; let auxY = difference.years || 0; let auxM = (difference.months || 0) + auxY * 12; for (let i = 0; i < auxM; i++) { auxD += getDaysInMonth(new Date(getYear(endDate), getMonth(endDate) + i)); } return { rDays: auxD, rHours: difference.hours || 0, rMinutes: difference.minutes || 0, rSeconds: difference.seconds || 0 };
};

Notice that the intervalToDuration from date-fns returns the range between seconds to years however my custom hook just returns the range between seconds to days so I had to implement the logic to convert the remaining months and years to days.

The logic is pretty much it. I used CSS Modules to style.

.countdown { display: flex; align-items: center;
} .dots { margin: 0 0.5rem;
} .dot { width: 3px; height: 3px; border-radius: 100%; background-color: #fff;
} .dot + .dot { margin-top: 3px;
} .clock { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; background-color: rgba(119, 126, 144, 0.2); border-radius: 8px; width: 70px; height: 60px;
} .ticker { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600;
} .label { font-size: 0.75rem;
} @media only screen and (min-width: 640px) { .dots { margin: 0 1rem; } .dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; } .dot + .dot { margin-top: 6px; } .clock { width: 100px; height: 90px; } .ticker { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; } .label { font-size: 1rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }
}

Notes 📖

  • At my original implementation here I didn't add the logic to convert months and years to days. I just realized that once I was writing this article 🙈

Takeaways 🎯

Besides this code, I would like to call your attention to some good React patterns I assembled together here which can be useful to apply in other projects.

  • Use custom hooks. They help you write clean code because it separates the view from the logic.
  • Keep closed related files in the same folder. Notice that I nested some files inside of the DateCountdown folder because those are being used just by that component.

Sandbox

Items.Title: Number of 1 Bits | 1 位数 | LeetCode Solution LeetCode 解决方案 | Number of 1 Bits | LeetCode Solution
Items.Description:
欢迎程序员回到我们的新博客，我们将讨论如何解决 Leet Code 问题以找出“1”位的数量。

所以在这里我们将使用 C++ 的 LeftShift 运算符。 所以让我们开始吧

问题陈述

编写一个函数，它接受一个无符号整数并返回它具有的“1”位数（也称为汉明权重）。

笔记：

请注意，在某些语言中，例如 Java，没有无符号整数类型。 在这种情况下，输入将作为有符号整数类型给出。 它不应该影响您的实现，因为整数的内部二进制表示是相同的，无论是有符号还是无符号。
在 Java 中，编译器使用 2 的补码表示法表示有符号整数。 因此，在示例 3 中，输入表示有符号整数。 示例 1：

Input: n = 00000000000000000000000000001011 Output: 3

解释：输入的二进制字符串 00000000000000000000000000001011 共有三个“1”位。

示例 2：

Input: n = 00000000000000000000000010000000 Output: 1

解释：输入的二进制字符串 00000000000000000000000010000000 总共有一个“1”位。

示例 3：

Input: n = 11111111111111111111111111111101 Output: 31

解释：输入的二进制字符串 1111111111111111111111111111101 共有 31 个“1”位。

解决方案

class Solution { public: int hammingWeight(uint32_t n) { // with the help of right shift operator int count = 0; while(n!=0){ if(n&1){ count++; } n = n>>1; } return count; } };

感谢您宝贵的时间。 你可以喜欢我的帖子和
你可以。

由我来一杯咖啡

我的另一个博客网站超过技术

我的 YouTube Vlog 频道



原文:

Welcome back coders to our new blog where we will talk about how can we solve a Leet Code problem to find out number of "1" bits.

So here we will be using LeftShift Operator of C++. So let's get started

Problem Statement

Write a function that takes an unsigned integer and returns the number of '1' bits it has (also known as the Hamming weight).

Note:

Note that in some languages, such as Java, there is no unsigned integer type. In this case, the input will be given as a signed integer type. It should not affect your implementation, as the integer's internal binary representation is the same, whether it is signed or unsigned.
In Java, the compiler represents the signed integers using 2's complement notation. Therefore, in Example 3, the input represents the signed integer. -3.

Example 1:

Input: n = 00000000000000000000000000001011 Output: 3

Explanation: The input binary string 00000000000000000000000000001011 has a total of three '1' bits.

Example 2:

Input: n = 00000000000000000000000010000000 Output: 1

Explanation: The input binary string 00000000000000000000000010000000 has a total of one '1' bit.

Example 3:

Input: n = 11111111111111111111111111111101 Output: 31

Explanation: The input binary string 11111111111111111111111111111101 has a total of thirty one '1' bits.

Solution

class Solution {
public:
    int hammingWeight(uint32_t n) {
        // with the help of right shift operator
        int count = 0;
        while(n!=0){
            if(n&1){
                count++;
            }
            n = n>>1;
        }
        return count;
    }
};

Accepts both aware and naive datetime objects Parameters ---------- datetime_value: datetime.datetime tz: pytz.timezone Returns ------- datetime.datetime """ if not isinstance ( datetime_value , dt . datetime ): raise SyntaxError if not hasattr ( tz , "zone" ) or tz . zone not in pytz . all_timezones : raise SyntaxError if ( datetime_value . tzinfo is not None and datetime_value . tzinfo . utcoffset ( datetime_value ) is not None ): datetime_value = datetime_value . astimezone ( tz ) else : datetime_value = tz . localize ( datetime_value ) return datetime_value

原文:

Peter van der Does

Posted on May 26

Convert a Python DateTime object from one timezone to another timezone. This snippet accepts either a naive or aware DateTime object.

Snippet 

# code/timezone.py

import datetime as dt
import pytz def to_timezone(datetime_value, tz): """ Convert the given datetime object to a datetime object with the given timezone. Accepts both aware and naive datetime objects Parameters ---------- datetime_value: datetime.datetime tz: pytz.timezone Returns ------- datetime.datetime """ if not isinstance(datetime_value, dt.datetime): raise SyntaxError if not hasattr(tz, "zone") or tz.zone not in pytz.all_timezones: raise SyntaxError if ( datetime_value.tzinfo is not None and datetime_value.tzinfo.utcoffset(datetime_value) is not None ): datetime_value = datetime_value.astimezone(tz) else: datetime_value = tz.localize(datetime_value) return datetime_value

Dumb Down Demistifying Dev - Dumb Down Demistifying Dev - May 11 5月11日



原文: 

#include<bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

class node{
    public:

int data;
node *left;
node *right;

 node();
  node(int data){
    this->data = data;
    this->left = this->right = NULL;
}
};

//**head act as a pointer to pointer

void bsttodll(node *root,node **head){

    if(root == NULL)return;

//Mention static as to access it through all recursion calls
     static node *prev = NULL;

//We have to traverse recursively in left sub tree
    bsttodll(root->left,head);
//When it'll reach the lestmost node and if prev  == null then set head as root and prev = root
//After this recursion it'll back to the previous recursion step and check prev, and set 
    if(prev ==  NULL) *head = root;
    //Here root->left store the prev and prev->right will store the root address

    else{
        root->left = prev;
        prev->right = root; 
    }
    prev = root;

 bsttodll(root->right,head);


}

void preorder(node *root){
    if(root==NULL)return;


    cout<<root->data<<" ";
    preorder(root->left);

    preorder(root->right);
}

void printdll(node *head){
    while(head != NULL){
        cout<<head->data<<" ";
        head = head->right;
    }

}

int main()
{
    node *root = new node(22);
    root->left = new node(7); 
     root->right = new node(28);
    root->left->left = new node(4);
    root->left->right = new node(9);

    root->right->left = new node(26);
    root->right->right = new node(29);
    preorder(root);
    cout<<endl;
    node *head = NULL;
    bsttodll(root,&head); //give address of dll node as head
    printdll(head);




 return 0;
}

Output:
22 7 4 9 28 26 29 4 7 9 22 26 28 29

return count;

Items.Title: Ethernaut系列-Level 13(GatekeeperOne) | Ethernaut系列-Level 13(GatekeeperOne)
Items.Description:
发表于参赛者=玩家

要点

1.tx.origin和msg.sender的区别，这个前面有讲 2.gas费用的设置

3.类型转换和位值

解题思路

gateOne：在则自己的合约调用其他合约，tx.origin和msg.sender永远不一样

gateTwo：先下gasleft()和契约是如何消耗gas，了解如何定义调用的最大gas可以通过console.log打印出大体的gasLeft()+（8191的倍数）即可

这个gasLeft()线上和本地的结果完全一样，可能是没有开启优化的关系，可以加个循环gas+1不断尝试

门三：
这个要了解单位转换的截取和补齐，看代码

合同/13GatekeeperOneRun.sol

 function run ( address _runAddress ) external { //gas = 254+8191; (用console.log打印出gas剩余,本地测算是254，不过线上可能有些许差异可能是有带优化参数,所以可以调小254进行循环测试) uint256 gas = 254 + 81910 ; /** * * 1.require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) == uint16(uint64(_gateKey)), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part one"); * 2.require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) != uint64(_gateKey), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part two"); * 3.require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) == uint16(tx.origin), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part three"); * gateKey三个条件都满足才能通过 * 分析： * 首先要把address转成对应的uint160,gateKey是byte8对应uint64 * 根据条件3：tx.origin的0-16跟gateKey的0-16是一样 * 根据条件1：16-32位要全是0 （不然截取后不会相等） * 根据条件2：32-64位不全是0 (不然截取后会相等) * 所以uint64(uint16(uint160(tx.origin))，把address转成160后截取成16再转成64位后，自动满足条件1和3，但不满足条件2，故再加上0x1_00_00_00_00即可（把33设为1） * */ bytes8 gateKey = bytes8 ( uint64 ( uint16 ( uint160 ( tx . origin )) + 0x100000000 )); while ( true ) { ( bool result ,) = _runAddress . call { gas : gas }( abi . encodeWithSignature ( "enter(bytes8)" , gateKey )); if ( result ) { break ; } gas ++ ; } }

Ali Orhun Akkirman - Ali Orhun Akkirman - May 25 5月25日



原文:

bin2chen

Posted on May 26 

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
pragma solidity ^0.6.0; import '@openzeppelin/contracts/math/SafeMath.sol'; contract GatekeeperOne { using SafeMath for uint256; address public entrant; modifier gateOne() { require(msg.sender != tx.origin); _; } modifier gateTwo() { require(gasleft().mod(8191) == 0); _; } modifier gateThree(bytes8 _gateKey) { require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) == uint16(uint64(_gateKey)), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part one"); require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) != uint64(_gateKey), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part two"); require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) == uint16(tx.origin), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part three"); _; } function enter(bytes8 _gateKey) public gateOne gateTwo gateThree(_gateKey) returns (bool) { entrant = tx.origin; return true; }
}

entrant=player

要点

1.tx.origin和msg.sender的区别，这个前面有讲 2.gas费用的设置

https://docs.soliditylang.org/en/v0.8.14/control-structures.html?highlight=gas%3A#external-function-calls

3.类型转换和位值

https://docs.soliditylang.org/en/v0.8.14/types.html#conversions-between-elementary-types

解题思路

gateOne:在自己的合约调用其他合约，则tx.origin和msg.sender就会不一样

gateTwo:要先了解下gasleft()和合约是如何消耗gas,如何指定调用的最大gas 可以通过console.log打印出对应合约大体的gasLeft()+ （8191的倍数）即可

这个gasLeft()线上和本地的不一定完全一样，可能是有没开启优化的关系，故可以加个循环gas+1不断尝试

gateThree:
这个要了解单位转换的截取和补齐，详见代码备注

contracts/13GatekeeperOneRun.sol

 function run(address _runAddress) external { //gas = 254+8191; (用console.log打印出gas剩余,本地测算是254，不过线上可能有些许差异可能是有带优化参数,所以可以调小254进行循环测试)
 uint256 gas = 254+81910; /** * * 1.require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) == uint16(uint64(_gateKey)), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part one"); * 2.require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) != uint64(_gateKey), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part two"); * 3.require(uint32(uint64(_gateKey)) == uint16(tx.origin), "GatekeeperOne: invalid gateThree part three"); * gateKey三个条件都满足才能通过 * 分析： * 首先要把address转成对应的uint160,gateKey是byte8对应uint64 * 根据条件3：tx.origin的0-16跟gateKey的0-16是一样 * 根据条件1：16-32位要全是0 （不然截取后不会相等） * 根据条件2：32-64位不全是0 (不然截取后会相等) * 所以uint64(uint16(uint160(tx.origin))，把address转成160后截取成16再转成64位后，自动满足条件1和3，但不满足条件2，故再加上0x1_00_00_00_00即可（把33设为1） * */ bytes8 gateKey = bytes8(uint64(uint16(uint160(tx.origin))+0x100000000)); while (true) { (bool result,) = _runAddress.call{gas:gas}(abi.encodeWithSignature("enter(bytes8)", gateKey)); if (result) { break; } gas++; } }

Items.Title: 如何在微服务中管理 Saga 模式中的异常 | How to Manage Anomalies in Saga Pattern in Microservices
Items.Description:
它将一个全局事务拆分为多个子事务，如果所有子事务操作都成功，则全局事务成功，如果一个子事务重试后仍然失败，则补偿所有执行的子事务。

上述过程简单明了，但在分布式环境中，可能会出现异常情况。 确保 Saga 事务正常工作并保持数据一致并非易事。 我们将讨论这里可能发生的各种异常以及如何管理它们。

出于讨论的目的，我们将 Saga 中分支事务的前向动作称为Action ，将补偿动作称为Compensation 。

三种异常情况

通常，如果发生回滚， Action会在 Saga 事务中的Compensation之前执行。 但是由于网络延迟，或者进程暂停，有可能先执行Compensation ，然后执行Action ，或者根本不执行。

这个场景在分布式事务中引入了两个异常：

  1. 挂起Action：当Action执行时， Compensation已经执行，所以Action需要判断Compensation已经执行，忽略业务数据更新，直接返回

分布式事务中需要处理的另一个常见异常是Duplicated Requests 。 当某个进程崩溃，Saga 重试服务时，服务可能会被多次调用，因此需要幂等处理。

这三种类型的异常需要谨慎管理，否则可能会出现数据不一致并扰乱业务。

解决方案

对于 Saga 模式，原理如下。

  1. 在本地数据库中创建表dtm_barrier.barrier，唯一索引为gid-branchid-branchop
  2. 开始本地事务
  3. 在Action和Compensation中，插入忽略一行gid-branchid-action|compensation ，如果受影响的行数为 0（在 Duplicate Requests 的情况下，Hanging Action），直接提交并返回
  4. 在Compensation中，insert 忽略额外的一行gid-branchid-action ，如果受影响的行数为 1（在 Null Compensation 的情况下），则直接提交并返回
  5. 执行业务逻辑并提交，如果发生错误则回滚

重复的请求

由于上面的唯一索引，保证重复请求中的插入被忽略，业务处理被跳过

零补偿

当发生空值补偿时，第3步插入成功和第4步被忽略插入将直接提交并返回，跳过业务逻辑。

悬挂动作

当Hanging Action发生时，已经执行了补偿，并且已经插入了一行gid-branchid-action ，所以在Action中会发现第3步的插入被忽略了，然后直接返回，跳过了业务逻辑

行动和补偿重叠

如果Action和Compensation在执行时间上重叠，则Compensation和Action都将插入同一行gid-branchid-action 。 由于唯一索引冲突，这两个操作中只有一个会成功，而另一个会等待持有锁的事务完成然后返回。

  • 场景一： Action失败， Compensation成功插入gid-branchid-action 。 这是一个典型的Null Compensation和Hanging Action场景， Action和Compensation都会忽略业务逻辑，直接按照上述算法返回
  • 场景 2： Action成功并且Compensation插入gid-branchid-action失败。 事务执行的顺序是Action before Compensation ，没有异常发生。 根据上述算法， Action和Compensation中的业务将有序执行
  • 场景3，如果数据库在重叠期间宕机，操作将被重试，最终会进入场景1或2。

综合以上场景， Sub-transaction Barrier能够妥善管理异常，保证数据一致性。

上述算法也适用于 TCC 分布式事务。 即使您使用工作流引擎（例如 Candence、Camunda）来处理 Saga 事务，该算法也适用。

代码

当与分布式事务框架https://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm结合使用时，上述Sub-transaction Barrier技术已在多种语言SDK中可用，以下示例代码在 Go 中。

 app . POST ( BusiAPI + "/SagaBTransOut" , dtmutil . WrapHandler ( func ( c * gin . Context ) interface {} { barrier := MustBarrierFromGin ( c ) return barrier . Call ( txGet (), func ( tx * sql . Tx ) error { return SagaAdjustBalance ( tx , TransOutUID , - reqFrom ( c ) . Amount , "" ) }) })) app . POST ( BusiAPI + "/SagaBTransOutCom" , dtmutil . WrapHandler ( func ( c * gin . Context ) interface {} { barrier := MustBarrierFromGin ( c ) return barrier . Call ( txGet (), func ( tx * sql . Tx ) error { return SagaAdjustBalance ( tx , TransOutUID , reqFrom ( c ) . Amount , "" ) }) }))

当我们把业务处理放在一个子事务屏障中时，前面描述的各种异常都被过滤掉了，开发者只需要考虑正常流程下的业务处理即可。

完整的示例可以在这里找到： https ://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm-examples。 结论

本文提出了一种算法来处理微服务的 Saga 模式中的异常。 它优雅高效，可以适用于 TCC 模式，也适用于许多工作流。

欢迎您访问https://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm 。 它是一个开源项目，致力于简化分布式事务的开发。



原文:

Saga is the most common pattern for ensuring cross-service data consistency. It splits a global transaction into multiple sub-transactions, and if all sub-transaction operations succeed, then the global transaction succeeds, and if one sub-transaction still fails after retries, then all executed sub-transactions are compensated.

The above process is simple and clear, but in a distributed environment, there are anomalies that can occur. It is not an easy job to ensure that a Saga transaction is working correctly and to keep the data in consistent. We will discuss the various anomalies that can occur here and how to manage them.

For the purposes of discussion, we will refer to the forward action of a branch transaction in Saga as Action and the compensating action as Compensation.

Three Types of Anomalies

Normally, the Action is executed before the Compensation in Saga transactions if rollback happens. But due to network delays, or process pauses, it is possible that the Compensation is executed first and the Action is executed later or not at all.

This scenarios introduces two anomalies in distributed transactions:

  1. Null Compensation: When Compensation is executing, the corresponding Action has not been executed, so the Compensation needs to determine that the Action has not been executed, ignore the business data updates, and return directly.
  2. Hanging Action: When the Action is executing, the Compensation has been executed, so the Action needs to determine that the Compensation has been executed, ignore the business data updates, and return directly

Another common anomaly that needs to be dealt with in distributed transactions is Duplicated Requests. When a process crashes and Saga retries the service, the service may be called multiple times, so idempotent processing is needed.

These three types of anomalies need to be managed carefully, otherwise data inconsistencies can occur and disrupt the business.

Solution

https://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm pioneered a technique name Sub-transaction Barrier for managing these three types of anomalies at the same time. For Saga pattern, the principle is as follows.

  1. Create a table dtm_barrier.barrier in the local database, with a unique index of gid-branchid-branchop
  2. Begin a local transaction
  3. In Action and Compensation, insert ignore a row gid-branchid-action|compensation, if the number of affected rows is 0 (in case of Duplicate Requests, Hanging Action), commit directly and return
  4. In Compensation, insert ignore an additional row gid-branchid-action, if the number of rows affected is 1 (in case of Null Compensation), commit directly and return
  5. Execute business logic and commit, or roll back if errors occur

Duplicated Requests

Because of the unique index above, insertion in duplicated requests are guaranteed to be ignored and business processing is skipped

Null Compensation

When a null compensation occurs, a successful insertion of step 3 and an ignored insertion of step 4 will be committed directly and returned, skipping the business logic.

Hanging Action

When Hanging Action occurs, the compensation has been executed and a row gid-branchid-action has been inserted, so in Action, it will find that the insertion at step 3 was ignored and then return directly, skipping the business logic

Action and Compensation Overlap

If Action and Compensation overlap in execution time, both Compensation and Action will insert the same row gid-branchid-action. Due to a unique index conflict, only one of the two operations will succeed, while the other will wait for the transaction holding the lock to complete and then return.

  • Scenario 1: The Action fails and the Compensation succeeds in inserting gid-branchid-action. This is a typical Null Compensation and Hanging Action scenario and both Action and Compensation will ignore the business logic and return directly according to the above algorithm
  • Scenario 2: The Action succees and the Compensation fails in inserting gid-branchid-action. The order of transaction execution is Action before Compensation, and no anomaly occur. According to the above algorithm, the business in Action and Compensation will be executed orderly
  • Scenario 3, If the database go down during the overlap, the operations will be retried and will eventually go to scenario 1 or 2.

In summary of the above scenarios, the Sub-transaction Barrier is able to properly manage the anomalies and ensure the data consistency.

The algorithm described above also applies to TCC distributed transactions. Even if you are using a workflow engine, such as Candence, Camunda, to handle Saga transactions, the algorithm also applies.

Code

The above Sub-transaction Barrier technique, when used in conjunction with the distributed transaction framework https://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm, has been made available in several language SDKs, with the following example code in Go.

app.POST(BusiAPI+"/SagaBTransOut", dtmutil.WrapHandler(func(c *gin.Context) interface{} { barrier := MustBarrierFromGin(c) return barrier.Call(txGet(), func(tx *sql.Tx) error { return SagaAdjustBalance(tx, TransOutUID, -reqFrom(c).Amount, "") })
}))
app.POST(BusiAPI+"/SagaBTransOutCom", dtmutil.WrapHandler(func(c *gin.Context) interface{} { barrier := MustBarrierFromGin(c) return barrier.Call(txGet(), func(tx *sql.Tx) error { return SagaAdjustBalance(tx, TransOutUID, reqFrom(c).Amount, "") })
}))

In TransOut service, the first line is to create a barrier from http request, and the next several lines call the business inside the barrier.

When we put business processing inside a sub-transaction barrier, the various anomalies described earlier, are filtered and the developer only needs to consider the business processing under normal flow.

The complete example can be found here: https://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm-examples. After dtm setup, you can run a complete example by following command:
go run main.go http_saga_barrier

Conclusion

This article propose an algorithm to handle anomalies in Saga pattern for microservices. It is elegant and efficient, which can apply to TCC pattern, and also apply to many workflows.

You are welcomed to visit https://github.com/dtm-labs/dtm. It is an opensourced project dedicated to ease the development of distributed transactions.

Items.Title: 用于视频录制的提词器脚本 | A teleprompter script for video recordings
Items.Description:
目前我正在录制很多视频，我发现最快的方法是编写脚本并将其读出到我的相机上，然后录制截屏视频并对其进行编辑以适应旁白。 为了确保我从屏幕顶部读取并读取到相机中，我不得不滚动我的脚本很多，这很烦人，所以我写了一个小的提词器脚本来解决这个问题。

您将获得一个文本框来编写或粘贴脚本，然后按“显示为提示”按钮将在屏幕顶部以大字体一次显示一个段落。 您可以单击文档或按右箭头键向前移动并按 Escape 键返回编辑。

如果你去https://codepo8.github.io/prompter你可以看到它的运行情况，源代码也在 GitHub 上。 这没什么花哨的，反正很多东西都是 GitHub CoPilot 为我写的。



原文:

Currently I am recording a lot of videos and I found the fastest way to do them is to write the script and read it out to my camera and then record screencasts and edit them to fit the narration. In order to make sure I read from the top of the screen and reading into the camera I had to scroll my scripts a lot, which was annoying so I wrote a small teleprompter script to work around that problem.

You get a text box to write or paste your script and pressing the "show as prompt" button will display one paragraph at a time at the top of the screen in a large font. You can click the document or press the right arrow key to move forward and Escape to go back to editing.

If you go to https://codepo8.github.io/prompter you can see it in action and the source is also on GitHub. It is nothing fancy and a lot was written by GitHub CoPilot for me anyways.
Items.Author: codepo8

Items.Title: 如何在编码时学习SMART而不是HARD | How to study SMART not HARD while coding
Items.Description:
1. 仅开始 5 分钟，然后继续前进
  2. 在特定时间做一些事情，比如 2 小时，在那段时间里什么都不做。
  3. 写下你的待办事项清单，这样你就不会想到它们
  4. 为自己设定最后期限以尽早完成某件事
  5. 享受这个过程（否则你会重新考虑你的专业）

首先，使用 5 分钟规则停止拖延。 学习如何不拖延对于让您更有效地完成工作至关重要。

其次，使用时间阻塞和其他生产力技巧来帮助我达到心流状态。 心流状态，也通俗地称为处于区域中，是一种精神状态，在这种状态下，进行某些活动的人完全沉浸在活动过程中充满活力、完全投入和享受的感觉中。 这对于提高生产力至关重要。

第三，使用一个待办事项应用程序作为我的个人知识管理系统。 这样，我所有的任务都存储在应用程序中，我不需要用我的大脑来记住它们。

第四，设定人工期限。 这听起来是不是很熟悉：你有一篇文章在一个月内到期。 在截止日期前一天，您取得的进展微乎其微，然后在最后一天用咖啡和能量饮料的力量填满了整个事情。 你可以给自己设定人为的截止日期，这意味着你表现得好像你的项目/论文到期了，例如，比实际提前一周。 这样一来，您就会为自己创造紧迫感，您的头脑将更有可能找到一种方法来尽早完成工作，并为您留出大量额外的时间，而无需承担该项目仍未完成的负担。

最后，试着享受这个过程。 因为如果你不这样做，那么重点在哪里:)。

致谢： Internet Made Coder
YouTube Link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JwRsn2VYzmQ YouTube 链接： https ://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JwRsn2VYzmQ



原文:
  1. Start for 5mins only and then keep going
  2. Do things at a specific time for like 2 hours and DO NOTHING ELSE DURING THAT TIME.
  3. Ride down your to do list, so you don't think of them
  4. Set deadlines for yourself to finish something early
  5. Enjoy the process (otherwise you rethink your major)

First, use the 5-minute rule to stop procrastination. Learning how to not procrastinate is crucial to allow you to get things done more effectively.

Second, use time-blocking and other productivity hacks to help me reach the flow state. The flow state, also known colloquially as being in the zone, is the mental state in which a person performing some activity is fully immersed in a feeling of energized focus, full involvement, and enjoyment in the process of the activity. This is critical to be more productive.

Third, use a to-do app as my personal knowledge management system. This way, all my tasks are stored in the app and I don't need to use my brain to remember them.

Fourth, set Artificial Deadlines. Does this sound familiar: You have an essay due in a month. You make minimal progress until a day before the deadline, then cram the entire thing on the last day with the power of coffee and energy drinks. You can impose artificial deadlines on yourself, meaning that you act as if your project/essay is due, for example, a week earlier than it actually is. This way, you are creating urgency for yourself and your mind will be more likely to find a way to get things done early and leave you with a bunch of extra time, free from the burden of having that project still be unfinished.

Lastly, try to enjoy the process. Because if you don't, where's the point anyway :).

Credits to: Internet Made Coder
YouTube Link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JwRsn2VYzmQ

Items.Title: 如何将您的职业转变为云 | How to transition your career into Cloud
Items.Description:
您好云学习者，

首先，感谢您花时间访问此页面，并感谢您有兴趣开始云职业。

为什么大家都在谈论云？ 里面有什么，人们开始使用。

云计算始于 2000 年（2006 年的 AWS 服务），当时云计算基础设施模型为他们提供了更有效地使用计算机容量的灵活性。

在最初的阶段，它们还没有被开发出来，并且由于担心安全性差而不是很受欢迎。 现在，几乎每家公司都计划迁移到云，因为下面列出了许多好处。

成本节约（资本支出与运营支出） 灵活性/可扩展性 移动性 增强协作 高速 快速部署（几分钟内走向全球） 自动软件更新和集成 数据安全 无限存储容量

备份和恢复数据等等.,.,

现在将开始深入研究云计算概念。

什么是云计算？
用非常简单的术语来说，“第三方数据中心的服务器”是指按需计算服务的交付——从应用程序到存储和处理能力——通常是通过互联网和按需付费的方式。

云计算的类型：

云计算服务的类型：

现在，您已经了解了云计算的非常基本的概念，并且有点困惑从哪里开始以及如何自己练习。

不用担心，有很多云专家为我们提供指导。 这里只是分享一些重要的资源，以便更熟悉云概念和动手操作。

首先，自行决定哪种云最适合您。 假设在您的公司中，他们已经在使用 AWS，然后继续使用。 一个优点是所有云提供商的基本概念都相同，只是条款可能有所不同。

好的，现在决定哪一个走得更远，那么下一步是什么。

计划做认证或动手或开始做云项目？ 停止，只是从你的思维模式中走出来，只是为了你将用于云计算的认证，不仅如此。 只要意识到这个（知道与做）的含义，你就会得到答案。

是的，您必须使用自己的帐户或某些云学习提供商的沙盒环境动手操作，而不是观看许多视频和阅读书籍。

当然，如果您多动手，您将对云概念充满信心，并且对您自己启动许多项目非常有用。

这是我熟悉云概念的最佳资源：

首先，通过观看 Cloud 基础视频花一些时间在 YouTube 上
订阅云培训提供商订阅（只需寻找年度促销，以便您可以放松并持续学习一年）在 LinkedIn 中关注云专家

加入一些云计算用户组（可以是任何 WhatsApp、Telegram、AWS 用户组、LinkedIn 组等）



原文:

Hello Cloud Learners,

First of all, thanks for your time visiting to this page and appreciate your interest to start cloud career.

Why everybody is talking about cloud ? What's there in it and people are jumping into start using.

Cloud computing started in 2000's (AWS Services from 2006) during that time cloud computing infrastructure model gave them flexibility to use their computer’s capacity much more efficiently.

In 2006, Amazon launched Amazon Web Services, which offers online services to other websites, or clients. One of Amazon Web Services’ sites, called Amazon Mechanical Turk, provides a variety of cloud-based services including storage, computation and “human intelligence.” Another of Amazon Web Services’ sites is the Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), allowing individuals to rent virtual computers and use their own programs and applications.

During the initial stage they were still undeveloped, and not very popular because of concerns with poor security. After 2010 it became very popular and companies started using Compute, storage, database, networking and many other services from cloud providers.

Now, almost every company planning to migrate to cloud because of many benefits as listed below.

Cost savings (CapEx vs OpEx) Flexibility/Scalability Mobility Increased collaboration High speed Quick deployment (Go global in minutes) Automatic Software Updates and Integration Data Security Unlimited Storage Capacity

Back-up and Restore Data and many more.,.,

Now will start diving into Cloud computing concepts.

What is cloud computing?
In very simple terms "servers in a third-party data center" it means the delivery of on-demand computing services — from applications to storage and processing power — typically over the internet and on a pay-as-you-go basis.

Types of Cloud computing:

Types of cloud computing services:

Now, you got the very basic concepts of Cloud computing and bit confused where to start and how you can practice by your own.

No worries, there are many Cloud experts are there to guide us. Here just sharing few important resources to get more familiar on cloud concepts and hands on.

First of all, decide by yourself which cloud is best for you. Let's say in your company they are already using AWS then go with that. One good point is underlying concepts are same with all cloud providers only the terms may vary from them.

Ok, now decided which one to go far then what would be the next step.

Planning to do certification or getting hands on or start doing cloud projects ? Stop, just come out from your mindset only for the certification you are going to use for Cloud computing it's more that that. Just realize the meaning of this (Knowing vs Doing) you'll get the answer.

Yes, rather than watching many videos and reading books you must do some hands on with your own account or with some cloud learning providers sandbox environment.

Definitely, If you do more hands on you will get confident on Cloud concepts and it will be very useful for you to start many project by your own.

Here're my best resources to get familiar on cloud concepts:

First, spend sometime on YouTube by watching Cloud basics videos
Subscribe for Cloud training provider subscriptions (Just look for yearly promotion so that you can be relaxed and do continuous learning for one year) Follow Cloud experts in LinkedIn

Join some Cloud computing User groups (Can be anything WhatsApp, Telegram, AWS User Groups, LinkedIn groups et.,)
