Items.Title: 一个老菜鸟 #7 - 徽章 | An Old Noob #7 - Badges
Items.Description:
最近我比较忙。

甚至在写完第一句话之后，就在这句话的正上方，我被要求移动一些窗帘并挂一面镜子。

但这不是我想谈的。 在我最近的消遣中，我上周忘记发布了。 这意味着我错过了 Dev.to 8 Week Streak 徽章。 不要误会我的意思，我希望我发表的原因不仅仅是连胜徽章。 但是徽章很有趣。

除非他们不是。


对于那些不熟悉的人，请允许我向您介绍Immersive Labs ，这是一个 IT 安全培训平台，幸运的是，它是通过我的雇主提供的。 这是一个很好的平台，可以接触到网络安全领域内的各种主题，从 Windows 开发到 NIST 标准再到恶意软件逆向工程。 登陆页面并没有做大量的内容正义。

因为我喜欢挑战，所以可以准确地假设当我们被允许访问 1500 多个可用的实验室时，我首先跳了脚。 快进大约 6 个月，我已经完成了很多实验。 其中一些实验室提供完成徽章。 我不得不说，我的 IL 仪表板看起来很酷。 我想如果我能以某种方式分享这些成就会很酷。

现在我想做的最后一件事就是出去在社交媒体上单独分享每个徽章，更不用说我怀疑有人希望他们的饲料被这种噪音淹没。 这让我想起了我的云简历：添加我获得的所有沉浸式实验室徽章的页面并将其链接到我的简历中，这不是一个不错的补充吗？

这就是我所做的。

每张图片不仅仅是一个充满图像的页面，而是一个指向徽章完成日期和实验室收藏详细信息的链接。 我还在页脚的链接中包含了我已完成的各个实验室的完整成绩单，以防有人可能想查看 26 页的 pdf 文件（完全知道这不太可能，但我最多371 个实验室！）。

是的，我知道这一切都可能是矫枉过正。 但是我花了很多时间在这些实验室上工作，我认为在一个相对隐蔽但易于访问的位置展示我的成就并没有提出太多要求。

既然我已经摆脱了自私的自豪感，那么如果您确实有机会看看 Immersive Labs，那里会遇到一些非常严峻的挑战。

如果您有想要与世界分享的成就，那就分享吧！ 然后沉浸在你的成功永远存在于互联网上的知识中，无论是否有人看到它=]



原文:

I tend to get pretty busy lately.

Even after just writing that first sentence, that one right above this one, i was asked to move some drapes and hang a mirror.

But that's not what i want to talk about. During my recent diversions, i forgot to publish last week. That means i missed out on the Dev.to 8 Week Streak badge. Don't get me wrong, i wish i had published for more reasons than the streak badge. But badges are fun.

Except when they're not.

 
For those of you unfamiliar, allow me to introduce you to Immersive Labs, an IT Security training platform which fortunately is offered through my employer. It's a great platform for exposure to all kinds of subjects within the cybersecurity realm, from Windows exploitation to NIST standards to malware reverse engineering. The landing page doesn't do the amount of content justice.

Since i enjoy a challenge, one could accurately assume that when we were granted access to the over 1500 labs available i jumped in feet first. Fast forward about 6 months and i've been able to complete a lot of labs. Some of those labs offer badges of completion. I've got to say, my IL dashboard looked pretty cool. I thought it would be cool if i could share these achievements somehow.

Immersive Labs knows badges are fun too, and they recently announced the ability to now share badge completion on social media (can't find an announcement for it or i'd link it). Now the last thing i want to do is go out and share each badge individually on social media, not to mention i doubt anyone wants their feed inundated with such noise. That got me thinking back to my cloud resume: wouldn't it be a decent addition to add a page of all the Immersive Labs badges i've earned and link that from my resume?

And that's just what i did.

Rather than just a page full of images, each image is a link to the badge completion date and details about the lab collection. I also included a full transcript of the individual labs i've completed in a link in the footer on the off-chance someone might want to see the 26-page pdf file (knowing full well that's highly unlikely, but i'm up to 371 labs!).

Yeah, i know all this may be overkill. But i've spent a lot of time working on these labs and don't think i'm asking too much to display my achievements in a relatively obscure yet easily accessible location.

Now that i've gotten my moment of selfish pride out of the way, if you do get a chance to look at Immersive Labs, there are some really solid challenges there.

And if you've got an achievement you want to share with the world, share it! Then bask in the knowledge that your success is forever hosted on the internet, whether anyone sees it or not =]

Items.Description:
安装 vim 插件

安装插件

埃斯特档案竞争者拉配置个性化的卡达usuario。 空心肠

:PlugInstall

Y empezara a instalarse todos los plugins, una vez finalizado, para salir presionamos Esc y escribimos :q . Y empezara a instalarse todos los plugins, una vez finalizado, para salir presionamos Esc y escribimos :q 。

Ahora, podemos ingresar de nuevo al archivo con nvim init.vim y visualizaremos nuestra configuracion establecida. Ahora，podemos ingresar de nuevo al archivo con nvim init.vim y visualizaremos nuestra configuracion establecida。



原文:

Para instalar neovim, ejecutaremos en Powershell el siguiente comando

winget install Neovim.Neovim

Para corroborar la instalacion, escribiremos nvim

Para poder salir de alli, presionamos Esc y escribimos :q

Instalacion de vim plug

El siguiente paso es instalar vim plug este nos permitira instalar plugins para neovim

Ejecutamos el siguiente comando en nuestro Powershell
iwr -useb https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junegunn/vim-plug/master/plug.vim |`ni "$(@($env:XDG_DATA_HOME, $env:LOCALAPPDATA)[$null -eq $env:XDG_DATA_HOME])/nvim-data/site/autoload/plug.vim" -Force

Para confirmar su instalación, basta con dirigirnos a
C:\Users\_\AppData\Local\nvim-data\site\autoload
Y dentro encontraremos el archivo plug.vim

Instalacion de Plugins

Primero vamos a dirigirnos a C:\Users\joshu\AppData\Local creamos una carpeta llamada nvim y dentro otra llamada plugged.

Dentro de nvim creamos un archivo llamado init.vim o descargamos el siguiente archivo.

Este archivo contendra la configuracion personalizada de cada usuario. Ahora vamos a abrir el archivo en la terminal con el comando

nvim init.vim

Dentro ejecutaremos

:PlugInstall

Y empezara a instalarse todos los plugins, una vez finalizado, para salir presionamos Esc y escribimos :q.

Ahora, podemos ingresar de nuevo al archivo con nvim init.vim y visualizaremos nuestra configuracion establecida.

Items.Title: 将 AWS EC2 与 Boto3 和 Python 结合使用 - 第 2 部分 | Using AWS EC2 with Boto3 & Python - Part 2
Items.Description:
它可用于直接与 Python 脚本中的 AWS 资源进行交互。

在本文中，我们将了解如何使用 Boto3 EC2 Python SDK 在 AWS EC2 上执行各种操作。

先决条件

  • 一个代码编辑器。 我们可以使用任何文本编辑器来处理 Python 文件。
  • 如果没有，请参阅此Boto 文档

使用 Boto3 启动、停止和终止 EC2 实例

code ec2_manage_instance.py
  • 将Python 脚本复制并粘贴到代码编辑器中并保存文件。

在 Python 脚本中，根据代码我们可以停止stop_instance() 、启动start_instance()或终止带有实例 ID 的实例terminate_instance() 。

  • 打开命令行并执行ec2_manage_instance脚本。
 python ~\ec2_manage_instance.py

一次查找多个 EC2 实例的特定详细信息

通过使用describe_instance()方法，我们可以获得许多不同 EC2 实例的特定属性。

 code ec2_multiple_instances.py
  • 将Python 脚本复制并粘贴到代码编辑器中并保存文件。

连接后，它会使用前面所示的describe_instances()方法来查询所有正在运行的 EC2 实例的各种属性。 它通过过滤一个可用属性instance-state-name ，将结果限制为仅运行实例，其值为running 。

为了只返回某些属性，脚本使用for循环遍历每个预留和每个预留内的每个实例，以打印出找到的每个实例的InstanceID 、 InstanceType 、 PrivateIPAddress和PublicIpAddress 。

  • 打开命令行并执行ec2_manage_instance脚本。
 python ~\ec2_multiple_instances.py

要了解有关在 Boto 中使用 EC2 的更多信息，请参阅Boto 文档

感谢您阅读我的文章直到最后。 我希望你今天学到了一些特别的东西。 如果您喜欢这篇文章，请分享给您的朋友，如果您有建议或想法与我分享，请在评论框中写下。



原文:

Boto3 is the Python SDK for AWS. It can be used to directly interact with AWS resources from Python scripts.

In this article, we will look at how we can use the Boto3 EC2 Python SDK to perform various operations on AWS EC2.

Prerequisites

  • AWS account
  • Python v3.6 or later need to be installed on our local machine.
  • A code editor. We can use any text editor to work with Python files.
  • AWS IAM user, an access key ID, and a secret key should be set up on our local machine with access to create and manage EC2 instances.
  • Boto3 Python AWS SDK should be already installed on the local machine. If not, refer this Boto documentation

Starting, Stopping and Terminating EC2 Instances with Boto3 

code ec2_manage_instance.py
  • Copy and paste the Python script into code editor and save the file.

In the Python script, based on the code we can stop stop_instance(), start start_instance() or terminate the instance terminate_instance() with instance ID.

  • Open command-line and execute the ec2_manage_instance script. 
python ~\ec2_manage_instance.py

Finding Specific Details of Multiple EC2 Instances at Once

By using the describe_instance() method, We can get specific attributes on many different EC2 instances.

code ec2_multiple_instances.py
  • Copy and paste the Python script into code editor and save the file.

The Python script establishes a client connection to AWS. Once connected, it then uses the describe_instances() method as shown earlier to query various attributes of all running EC2 instances. It’s limiting results to only running instances by filtering on one of the available attributes, instance-state-name, with the value of running.

To return only certain attributes, the script uses a for loop to iterate over each reservation and each instance inside of each reservation to print out the InstanceID, InstanceType, PrivateIPAddress and PublicIpAddress of each instance found.

  • Open command-line and execute the ec2_manage_instance script. 
python ~\ec2_multiple_instances.py

To know more about using EC2 in Boto, refer Boto documentation

Thanks for reading my article till end. I hope you learned something special today. If you enjoyed this article then please share to your friends and if you have suggestions or thoughts to share with me then please write in the comment box.

Items.Title: 你的公司是如何在产假后重新加入你的？ 你觉得回来受欢迎吗？ | How did your company re-onboard you after parental leave? Did you feel welcomed back?
Items.Description:
这是一个不愿透露姓名的成员发送的匿名帖子。 请仔细考虑您的回复，因为这些帖子通常很难写。 如果您想发表匿名评论或想提出自己的匿名问题，请发送电子邮件至 sloan@dev.to 。

我和我的伴侣目前都在休育儿假。 和我们的孩子待在家里真是太好了（而且疯狂、忙碌，我们一直处于疲惫的状态）！ 但是随着月份的临近，重返工作岗位的期望越来越高，我的焦虑也越来越大。

我不知道回来后会发生什么——我会及时了解我错过的一切吗？ 我所有的责任还会在那里让我再次接管吗？ 或者如果我在我的角色中所做的所有工作都被撤销了，我需要重新学习一切怎么办？ 我很想对此有所了解——作为一个新父母，这绝对是我的想法，任何建议的话都会非常感激。



原文:

This is an anonymous post sent in by a member who does not want their name disclosed. Please be thoughtful with your responses, as these are usually tough posts to write. Email sloan@dev.to if you'd like to leave an anonymous comment or if you want to ask your own anonymous question.

My partner and I are currently both on parental leave. It's been wonderful (and crazy, hectic, we exist in a constant state of exhaustion) to be at home with our little one! But as the months approach, the anticipation of returning to work has been on the rise, and so has my anxiety.

I don't know what to expect upon return - will I be caught up to date on everything I've missed? Will all my responsibilities still be there for me to take over again? Or what if all the work I've done in my role has been undone, and I need to re-learn everything? I'd love some insight into this - as a new parent, it's definitely been on my mind, and any words of advice would be very appreciated.
Items.Author: sloan
